payload.title: Meta Ad Destination URL Update — Point Directly to /shop
payload.summary: Update Meta ad destination URLs from redirect pages (/get-started, /checkout/family) to direct /shop landing. Current ads force a redirect hop that causes 75% of paid sessions to bounce before reaching the catalog. Expected lift: 25% → 40-50% /shop reach rate.
payload.recommendedAction: Approve updating 8 ad creatives in Meta campaign 120243766361490762 to point directly to /shop with UTM params and promo=FRESH10. All other ad elements (creative, copy, targeting, budget) unchanged. Detailed plan in analytics/cro-recommendation-unc-880.md
risks: Minor: users with old ad links in browser history will still hit redirect pages (acceptable, redirects remain as fallback)
Minor: ~1-2 hour implementation window in Meta Ads Manager
Low rollback complexity: revert destination URLs in Meta UI (<5 min)
